lines.text: Black dust in orbit, cascades down like a parachute / Bricks on my shoulders, oh / This gravity hurts when you know the truth
I'm pullin' my weight in gold / Call me anxious, call me broke / But I can't lift this on my own
We dreamt like martyrs, oh-oh / I never thought I was bold enough (Baby) / You pushed me farther, ooh / I take the blame for the both of us
Oh, universe, hold me up / Tried your best, is it ever enough / When it's already draggin' me down?
